series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains: initial and renewal applications and supporting documentation, e.g., laboratory analyses and evidence of liability insurance, submitted by manufacturers of ignition interlock devices for licensure (licensee) and certification of their devices; their annual reports of sales and net profits of their devices and supporting documentation; copies of manufacturer licenses and device certificates issued to the licensee; and all correspondence between licensee and the Department.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current, plus 4 years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license/certification. Records may be transferred to DPS Record Center during retention period. Records may be imaged. If imaged, paper may be destroyed when electronic record is validated. ; Electronic: Retain current, plus 4 years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license/certification. Records are retained on network drives in the Ohio Traffic Safety Office., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
